description: A clinical neuropsychologist is screening a cohort of older adults for Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) using the Paired Associate Learning (PAL) task. Analyze the trial-by-trial data at ~/pebl/data/pal_raw_data.csv (columns: participant_id, stage, attempt, patterns_correct, errors, passed, mean_rt_ms) to compute clinical metrics. Exclude any participant whose global average reaction time across all attempts is < 200 ms. For each valid participant, calculate 'max_stage_completed' (highest stage where passed is 1), 'first_attempt_memory_score' (sum of patterns_correct on attempt 1 across all stages), and 'total_errors' (sum of all errors).
